verdict.answer_first: B is slightly closer: sentence 1 says "recommended default path"; A starts with "No problem — I'll give you the plan" and still frames before prescribing.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder with "The single most important step... rehearse... Do it twice"; B splits into "Two routes" and "two forks" more visibly.
verdict.fabrication: A: "~3× the effort" and "#1 surprise" are unverified numbers/claims. B: "You dismissed the questions" is invented context, plus "#1 source" is unverified.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to execute end-to-end: "Phase 0" through "Phase 5," "reset all sequences," "verify row counts," "run ANALYZE," and "24–48h" monitoring.
